seed_problem: Pack polyominoes into a W x H board maximizing covered area (reflections allowed).
mutation: composite: generalize input (each grid cell carries a traffic-yield weight + vent obstacles) and retarget the objective from covered area to maximum total weighted yield harvested by placed polyominoes under stock limits -> a weighted (value-density) 2D packing / geometric knapsack.
title: Abyssal Cable Grid: Relay-Pod Deployment
strategies: trivial: anchored greedy using only design 0 (the checker baseline)
greedy: single row-major pass placing the best-yield pod anchored at each free cell
strong: global-best greedy placing the single highest-yield feasible pod each round, tie-broken by yield density
local search / multi-restart randomized packing over placement order (not implemented in ladder but viable)
